summary: Revize 17 Spin-the-Wheel inline right panel verified end-to-end via Playwright. All 9 test sections passing: (1) Setup phase 3-column layout intact, ROLL DICE disabled until tactic chosen, enabled after; (2) Transition removes setup left/right columns and shows draft right panel; (3) club-season-spinner appears with 'ÇEKİLİYOR…' during 900ms roll, then locks to rolled-team-name + rolled-season and shows 13 pool-player-N cards; (4) Card click highlights (cancel-selection-button appears) and green pitch slots become clickable — placement succeeds; (5) After placement, panel returns to spin-the-wheel-idle with hint 'KADRO: 1/11' and roll-dice-button-draft visible; (6) SPACE bar in idle triggers the spin; (7) reroll-button-draft / change-button-draft / change-year-button-draft all present and change-button-draft decrements changes-remaining (3/3 → 2/3); (8) localStorage-injected full XI yields '🏆 KADRON HAZIR' view and enabled start-tournament-button which navigates to ŞAMPIYONLAR LİGİ GRUP AŞAMASI (TEST team in Group E); (9) NEGATIVE — neither data-testid='pool-modal' nor 'close-pool-button' present anywhere across the flow.
critical_code_review_comments: DraftScreen.jsx is 638 lines — still close to the 700-line limit. The legacy SlotSpinner (lines 611-634) and the unused DiceButton/_unusedDice shim (line 637) are dead code from the modal era and should be removed.
ClubSeasonSpinner instantiates two setInterval timers but the cycling=false path still mounts the component with empty interval setup; minor — no real cost since the early return guards it.

SpinTheWheelIdle attaches a global window keydown listener inside useEffect — when transitioning between idle and rolling states this listener is correctly cleaned up, but ensure no other screens listen for Space (verified none in scope).
Roll/Change/Change-Year handlers are duplicated between phases; could be extracted to a small hook (useDraftActions) to slim DraftScreen.
The 'YENİ ZAR' label vs. testid 'reroll-button-draft' is fine, but consider renaming the testid to 'new-roll-button-draft' for consistency with Turkish UI text; not blocking.
seed_data_creation: Injected synthetic 11-player XI into localStorage key 'ucl_draft_save_v1' to test 11/11 KADRON HAZIR view and start-tournament-button → TournamentScreen navigation. Cleared after test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: DraftScreen has two phases: 'setup' (col-3 / col-6 / col-3) and 'draft' (col-8 pitch + col-4 right panel). Right panel states: SpinTheWheelIdle (no pool, not rolling) → ClubSeasonSpinner cycling=true (during 900ms roll) → ClubSeasonSpinner cycling=false + card grid (after lock) → idle again after placement → '🏆 KADRON HAZIR' when 11/11. Testids: spin-the-wheel-idle, club-season-spinner, rolled-team-name, rolled-season, pool-player-N, roll-dice-button-draft, reroll-button-draft, change-button-draft, change-year-button-draft. SPACE bar triggers spin only in idle state. Modal removed: pool-modal and close-pool-button are gone. SAVE_KEY remains 'ucl_draft_save_v1'.
verified_flows: Setup intact: team-name-input, formation-4-3-3, tactic-GEGENPRESS, roll-dice-button, roster-count all visible
ROLL DICE disabled before tactic; enabled after
Transition to draft: setup roster-count / roll-dice-button / formation panel removed from DOM
club-season-spinner appears with 'ÇEKİLİYOR…' during the 900ms roll
After lock, rolled-team-name='Juventus', rolled-season='2003', 13 pool-player-N cards rendered
Bottom action bar (draft phase, pool exists): change-year-button-draft, change-button-draft, reroll-button-draft all visible
Card click selects (cancel-selection-button appears), placement on pitch slot succeeds
After placement: spin-the-wheel-idle returns with 'KADRO: 1/11' hint and roll-dice-button-draft
SPACE bar in idle triggers a new spin (club-season-spinner appears, lock completes)
11/11 via localStorage injection: 'KADRON HAZIR' shown, start-tournament-button enabled, click → TournamentScreen with TEST team in Group E
NEGATIVE: pool-modal and close-pool-button do NOT exist anywhere in the DOM across all phases
